creator: bpurgar@gmail.com
text:
After testing in ap mode i try to test mesh mode with 2 TL-MR3020 and ar956x (amd64) device (laptop). Everething is ok when 2 devices working but when i try to setup third mesh node i got kernel panic on device that is connected to node on which third node is connecting.For example:

Node1 <-> Node2
|
Node3 (connecting to node1) result is panic on node2 while connection betwen node1 and node3 is ok.

In attach i send images of panic.

-HEAD on all 3 nodes and HT enabled.

pictures of crash :

http://s11.postimg.org/6nvfmjloj/20150705_150820.jpg
http://s21.postimg.org/3x5dptdc7/20150705_150853.jpg
http://s17.postimg.org/f7vhwlqtr/20150705_150902.jpg
